rationale: In the citing paper, the referenced work corresponding to this DOI is only acknowledged as a companion paper in the same issue (e.g., brief mentions of Bronnenberg et al. "in this issue"). The citing article does not rely on that specific paper's framework, evidence, or results to build its core arguments about the Lucas critique. Its substantive development is instead anchored in broader economics and marketing-method references and in discussion of Franses' paper.
